remarks: Elevated Modernity in the Heart of New Canaan - Nestled in the vibrant center of New Canaan, The Quartier introduces a limited collection of 21 bespoke residences where classic architectural grace meets sustainable innovation. This sophisticated, free-standing two-bedroom townhome spans nearly over 2,500 square feet of meticulously curated space, anchored by 7" wide-plank white oak flooring and soaring windows that bathe the interior in natural light. The culinary center is a masterpiece of design, featuring custom Leicht cabinetry, exquisite quartzite surfaces, and professional-grade appliances. Retreat to the primary suite, a private sanctuary complete with a spa-inspired bath and two expansive walk-in closets. Beyond the residence, residents enjoy a lifestyle of effortless luxury with a full-time concierge, a professional fitness studio, a state-of-the-art golf simulator, and an elegant entertainment lounge with catering kitchen. Perfectly positioned just steps from world-class dining, upscale boutiques, and the NYC rail line, this home offers a seamless blend of timeless character and contemporary convenience.
